top_signals.title: French Navy Boards Suspected Russian ‘Shadow Fleet’ Tanker in Atlantic
top_signals.summary: France's navy has intercepted a sanctioned tanker linked to the Russian oil trade in the Atlantic Ocean and ordered the vessel to head for the French mainland, in a move Russia said was illegal and bordered on "international piracy".French President…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
